list.name: dynamic
list.signature: async dynamic(inputs) => // note that $meta.dynamic function *cannot reference/use any variables/lists/etc. that are outside of itself*. In other words, its code must be *fully* self-contained (i.e. only use `inputs.urlParams`). It must also use pure JavaScript (i.e. no Perchance-specific features like `foo.selectOne`, `foo.titleCase`, etc.).
